title: MoreChatHistoryNeoForge
description: Increases the maximum length of chat history.but NeoForge!
body:
This mod is an unofficial NeoForge 1.21 remaster of the "[More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)" mod, and it has been open-sourced on GitHub.

In the original version, the chat history only saves the most recent 100 messages, which can sometimes lead to the loss of important chat messages, especially during mini-games or when you are AFK.

This mod increases the chat history limit to 16384, and this remastered version also allows the default value of 16384 to be customized through a configuration file.

In addition, this mod adds the feature of retaining historical chat records, which can be turned on or off through the configuration file, and it is enabled by default.
